name: carbonwise-ai
description: Production-grade carbon footprint tracking application with AI-powered sustainability insights

scripts.build: npm run build:server && npm run build:client
scripts.test: npm run test:server && npm run test:client
scripts.lint: npm run lint:server && npm run lint:client
scripts.type-check: cd server && npx tsc --noEmit && cd ../client && npx tsc --noEmit
